query:
-- Check if SSSDYXTO (UCXcel Essential, CPM Advisory) has a billing item matched but no service_billing_assignment
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.serviceExternalId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_billing_assignments sba WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = 'SSSDYXTO') as assignment_count
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = 'SSSDYXTO'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%UCXcel%'
LIMIT 10;
